text:
-=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
347 J0800D_PRTCTV_MVMT_CD J0800D_PRTCTV_MVMT_CD J0800D Staff Assessment for Pain: Protective Movement Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had protective body movements or postures, (bracing, guarding, rubbing, or massaging a body part/area, clutching or holding a body part during movement) which may be an indicator of pain in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no
